name: prism-coder
desc: Persistent memory + local AI for coding agents. 1.7B–32B open-weight LLM fleet, cross-session Mind Palace, cognitive routing, L3 grounding verifier, multi-agent Hivemind. Works with Claude Code, Cursor, VS Code. Offline-first, HIPAA-ready. Free tier included.

name: autopus-adk
desc: Autopus-ADK is of the agents, by the agents. for the agents. Multi-model orchestration (consensus/pipeline/debate/fastest). Architecture-as-Code, Lore decision tracking, SPEC/EARS engine.

name: Sage
desc: Multi-Agent System Framework For Complex Tasks

name: agi
desc: The first distributed AGI system. Thousands of autonomous AI agents collaboratively train models, share experiments via P2P gossip, and push breakthroughs here. Fully peer-to-peer. Join from your browser or CLI.

name: clawmetry
desc: See your agent think. Real-time observability for 12 AI agent runtimes - OpenClaw, NVIDIA NemoClaw, Claude Code, Codex & 8 more.

name: DashClaw
desc: 🛡️The governance runtime for AI agents. Intercept actions, enforce guard policies, require approvals, and produce audit-ready decision trails.

name: codux
desc: ⬛  A native connected terminal for AI agent development. 为 AI Agent 开发而生的原生互联终端。

name: aidevops
desc: Vibe-Coding is easy. DevOps is hard. OpenCode & Git token-efficient AI agent automation for your app, business, and personal development. Opinionated tools, services, CLI & API stack for speed, security, and 24/7 results. Open-source first. SOTA everything. Try on your repos for money-making magic.

name: aiwg
desc: Cognitive architecture for AI-augmented software development. Specialized agents, structured workflows, and multi-platform deployment. Claude Code · Codex · Copilot · Cursor · Factory · Warp · Windsurf.
